Executive Summary
STRONG PERFORMER: Trinity Solar is EXCEEDING the 98% LightReach target at 99.54% with ZERO accounts past due 30+ days. One of the cleanest portfolios in the LightReach ecosystem.
  • Collection rate 99.54% -- 1.54% ABOVE the 98% LightReach target
  • ZERO 30+ day delinquencies. Only 6 early-stage accounts ($487, all under 25 days)
  • Average FICO 772 -- exceptional credit quality. 98% Auto ACH enrollment
  • NE concentration: NJ (36%), CT (35%) represent 71% of portfolio
  • Battery attachment ~1% (3 accounts) -- significant Energy Backup cross-sell opportunity
  • NPS not yet activated -- recommend immediate activation for Platinum tier path

NPS Activation & Growth Initiatives
  • Activate NPS surveys for all 313 accounts within 2 weeks
  • First meaningful NPS data expected at Week 6-8
  • If NPS positive (expected), fast-track Platinum tier evaluation
  • Only 13 EPCs hold Platinum in 2026 -- Trinity should be #14
  • Energy Backup cross-sell: only ~1% battery attachment (3 accounts)
  • NE markets ideal for battery: grid reliability, storm resilience
  • FICO 772 avg = virtually every customer qualifies (675 FICO min)
  • TCD-powered campaigns can target installed base for battery leads
Palmetto LightReach  |  Confidential  |  March 2026
Phased Implementation

Maintain & Monitor

  • Continue current payment follow-up protocols
  • Monitor 6 early-stage delinquencies weekly
  • Maintain 98% auto ACH -- target 100%
  • Monthly collection rate review with PLR RM
  • Do not relax FICO thresholds to chase volume

Growth Levers

  • Energy Backup pilot with top-performing reps
  • NE expansion into additional utility territories
  • TCD campaigns for installed base battery leads
  • Solar 3.0: position for all 4 product lines
  • Volume growth from strong 313-account foundation

Key Takeaways
  • BEST-IN-CLASS COLLECTIONS: 99.54% collection rate, 1.54% above target. Zero 30+ day past-due accounts.
  • EXCEPTIONAL CREDIT QUALITY: Average FICO 772. Superior underwriting drives superior payment performance.
  • PLATINUM TIER CANDIDATE: All measurable KPIs exceed Platinum standards. Only missing piece is NPS data.
  • MASSIVE CROSS-SELL OPPORTUNITY: ~1% battery attachment = 99% untapped. 313 accounts in NE ideal for battery.
  • INVEST, DON'T REMEDIATE: This partner deserves resource investment. Trinity exemplifies Solar 3.0.
